name: DDM Holding AG
summary: DDM Holding AG acquires and manages distressed asset portfolios with a focus on non-performing loans in Southern, Central, and Eastern Europe. It is involved in the acquisition of loan portfolios from financial institutions; and collection of the debt outstanding, as well as the provision of access to a portfolio management, business development, servicing, and technology platforms. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Zug, Switzerland. As of December 31, 2020, DDM Holding AG operates as a subsidiary of DDM Group Finance S.A.
